exploration_notes: The flipt codebase has NO existing OCI storage or `internal/oci/` directory — this is entirely new functionality. The current storage is Git-based with credentials defined in `internal/config/credentials.go` (4 types: basic, ssh, access_token, github_app) and implemented in `internal/credentials/credentials.go`.
